topics.title: St. Louis Radio Host Fired for Racial Slur
topics.summary: The show discusses the firing of a St. Louis radio host who used a racial epithet while discussing Condoleezza Rice, comparing the incident to other instances of perceived censorship and controversy in broadcasting.

topics.title: St. Louis DJ Fired Over Alleged Slur
topics.summary: The studio discusses the firing of a St. Louis radio host who allegedly used a racial slur while praising Condoleezza Rice, and the host defends his actions as an unintentional slip of the tongue.

topics.title: Radio Host Terminated for Racial Slur
topics.summary: The studio discusses the firing of a St. Louis radio host who used a racial slur, debating whether it was a slip of the tongue or an indication of racism while critiquing his lack of public defense.

topics.title: Comedy Sketches and Celebrity Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a series of comedic segments including a skit about an American Idol contestant, a parody of a CNN news broadcast involving Dice Clay, and a recurring joke regarding a mountain climber.

topics.title: Howard Stern Addresses Wig Rumors and NASCAR News
topics.summary: The studio discusses rumors regarding Howard Stern's hair, celebrity gossip involving Carmen Electra and Billy Joel, a legal situation involving baseball player Dwight Gooden, and the upcoming arrival of NASCAR driver Kurt Busch.

topics.title: Dice Clay Reunion
topics.summary: The studio welcomes comedian Dice Clay for his first appearance in eight years to discuss his personal life, a past feud with the host, and a controversial television interview.

topics.title: Past Conflicts and Real Estate Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio explores past professional tensions, personal relationship boundaries, and a humorous story involving a real estate deal complicated by a misunderstanding over African art.

topics.title: Haunted House and Real Estate Anecdotes
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding a haunted house in Jersey, the behavior of an individual named DICE during a real estate meeting, and various repetitive statements about unknown occurrences.

topics.title: Dice's Career and Family Life
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion about Dice's professional rivalries in comedy, his transition from retirement to performing at large venues like the Garden, and his experiences as a father to musically talented sons.

topics.title: Andrew Dice Clay Reunion
topics.summary: The studio hosts Andrew Dice Clay for a discussion regarding his past career hurdles, his professional relationship with the show, and a reconciliation of their long-standing personal feud.

topics.title: Staff Conflict Over Equipment and Personal Space
topics.summary: The studio records a heated confrontation between staff members regarding the unauthorized use of personal equipment and the breach of professional boundaries.

topics.title: Staff Conduct and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal staff boundaries regarding a coworker named Sal, the return of a guest named Dice, and various celebrity news stories involving aviation safety, weight loss, and recent relationships.

topics.title: MySpace Profiles and Comedy Brackets
topics.summary: The studio discusses a staff member's MySpace profile, upcoming comedy competition brackets featuring various comedians, and internal disputes regarding professional conduct.

topics.title: Weight Loss Meetings and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding a colleague's participation in weight loss meetings, followed by segments on celebrity news involving Kevin Costner, Barbara Streisand, and Eva Longoria.

topics.title: Pop Culture, News, and Comedy
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity gossip regarding Eva Longoria and Lindsay Lohan, critiques of superhero tropes, reports on international news including a woman in Argentina and missing persons cases, and the legalities of strip club business meetings.
